Bash(cd "/Users/jaehee/Downloads/Vibe Coding/agentic_system" && python -W ignore -c "
import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

token = os.environ['NOTION_TOKEN']
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Notion-Version': '2022-06-28'}

# 03/19 페이지 properties 확인
page_id = '2dbd5cdf-2cd4-80e8-9f69-deb8286d674b'
r = requests.get\(f'https://api.notion.com/v1/pages/{page_id}', headers=headers\)
page = r.json\(\)
print\('=== Properties ==='\)
for k, v in page.get\('properties', {}\).items\(\):
    vtype = v.get\('type'\)
    if vtype == 'title':
        val = ''.join\(t.get\('plain_text',''\) for t in v.get\('title', []\)\)
    elif vtype == 'rich_text':
        val = ''.join\(t.get\('plain_text',''\) for t in v.get\('rich_text', []\)\)
    elif vtype == 'checkbox':
        val = v.get\('checkbox'\)
    elif vtype == 'multi_select':
        val = [s.get\('name'\) for s in v.get\('multi_select', []\)]
    else:
        val = f'\({vtype}\)'
    print\(f'  {k}: {repr\(val\)}'\)

# 다른 날짜 페이지 블록도 확인 \(content 있는 페이지 찾기\)
print\(\)
print\('=== DB 전체 페이지 목록 \(최근 20개\) ==='\)
r2 = requests.post\(
    f'https://api.notion.com/v1/databases/{os.environ[\\"NOTION_DATABASE_ID\\"]}/query',
    headers=headers,
    json={'page_size': 20}
\)
for p in r2.json\(\).get\('results', []\):
    for k, v in p.get\('properties', {}\).items\(\):
        if v.get\('type'\) == 'title':
            title = ''.join\(t.get\('plain_text',''\) for t in v.get\('title', []\)\)
            print\(f'  [{p[\\"id\\"]}] \\"{title}\\"'\)
            break
")

import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
key = os.environ.get\('TODOIST_API_KEY', ''\)
resp = requests.get\(
    'https://api.todoist.com/api/v1/tasks',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}'},
    params={'limit': 2},
    timeout=10,
\)
data = resp.json\(\)
print\('Keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
if data.get\('results'\):
    task = data['results'][0]
    print\('Task keys:', list\(task.keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('due field:', json.dumps\(task.get\('due'\), indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/Users/jaehee/Downloads/Vibe Coding/agentic_system" && python -c "
import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
key = os.environ.get\('TODOIST_API_KEY', ''\)
# due가 있는 태스크 찾기
resp = requests.get\(
    'https://api.todoist.com/api/v1/tasks',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}'},
    timeout=10,
\)
data = resp.json\(\)
for task in data.get\('results', []\):
    if task.get\('due'\):
        print\('due:', json.dumps\(task['due'], indent=2\)\)
        print\('priority:', task.get\('priority'\)\)
        print\('content:', task.get\('content'\)\)
        break
else:
    print\('due 있는 태스크 없음, total:', len\(data.get\('results', []\)\)\)
    print\('checked 필드 예시:', data['results'][0].get\('checked'\) if data.get\('results'\) else None\)
" 2>&1)

from notion_client import Client
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
c = Client\(auth=os.environ['NOTION_TOKEN']\)
# databases에 없으면 search로 시도
result = c.search\(filter={'property': 'object', 'value': 'database'}\)
print\('search works:', len\(result.get\('results', []\)\), 'results'\)
# pages.create, blocks.children 확인
print\('blocks children attrs:', [a for a in dir\(c.blocks.children\) if not a.startswith\('_'\)]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
from notion_client import Client
import os, json
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
c = Client\(auth=os.environ['NOTION_TOKEN']\)
db_id = os.environ['NOTION_DATABASE_ID']
# raw request로 query 시도
try:
    result = c.request\(
        path=f'databases/{db_id}/query',
        method='POST',
        body={'page_size': 1},
    \)
    print\('raw query works:', list\(result.keys\(\)\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('raw query error:', e\)

# databases 객체에 parent 확인
print\('databases.parent:', c.databases.parent\)
" 2>&1)
